request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies in NATO are actually benefiting more from our defense commitments than we are? A recent study shows that while we spend billions on collective defense, many allies are underinvesting in their own security. It's time to rethink our burden-sharing agreements to ensure America's safety comes first. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
